pageContext.name: Last Son of Krypton
pageContext.description: This is the moment that defines Krypton's legacy for all time.   Sideshow Art Prints and Alex Ross Art present the Last Son of Krypton Fine Art Lithograph, a stunning Superman art print depicting the iconic hero's humble origins.  The fight for truth, justice, and a better tomorrow started with Kal-El's past. Legendary comics artist Alex Ross captures his fateful escape from the doomed planet of Krypton, hurtling towards Earth in an escape rocket. From there, the Kryptonian infant was welcomed by a humble Kansas family, taking on the identity of Clark Kent until the world needed Kal-El to become Superman. Donning the blue, red, and yellow suit, he now stands strong as a beacon of hope for all those across the Omniverse in need of a champion.  Each Last Son of Krypton Fine Art Lithograph is hand-signed by Alex Ross and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 200 pieces. This dynamic DC Comics wall art is an essential addition to any fan's own Hall of Justice.  Welcome Superman to Earth and to your collection with the Last Son of Krypton Fine Art Lithograph by Alex Ross today.
